title: Slot Colorizer
description: A utility mod that customizes the item slot fill color based on the item you’re holding.
body:
-----

# <center> 🌈 Slot Colorizer </center>

**<center> Item Slot Colorizer that depends on your items! </center>**

-----

## Introduction
> Ever wanted your item slots to change color depending on your items?   
> **Then this mod is perfect for you!**

## Features
- Custom config menu
- Add/Remove blocks/items via config
- Colorize item slot's fill color by selecting colors!
- Custom color picker UI supported!

## Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Optional)

## Environments
|Platform        |Supported?      |
|:--------------:|:--------------:|
|Fabric          |✅              |
|Forge           |❌              |
|Quilt           |❌              |
|NeoForge        |❌              |
